attacking_style: Moves in breakaways and attacking groups on final climbs, capable of staying away but struggles to convert against pure sprinters or on the longest, hardest summit finishes.
team_tactics: Team employs dual-track strategy: places Sanchez in breaks while simultaneously protecting primary GC leader, suggesting break specialist role rather than protected captain status.
terrain_preference: Suited to medium-mountain stages with final climb attacks where tactical positioning matters more than pure climbing power. Exposed on long, steep summit finishes and individual time trials.
vulnerability: Weak time trialist (7th place while defending GC) and gets dropped on hardest climbs (lost 4+ minutes on Colmiane). Cannot sustain GC challenges once ITT or high-mountain stages arrive.
key_patterns: Used in breakaway tactics while team protects different GC leader (2 instances)
Loses significant time on hardest summit finishes, dropped from contention (2 instances)
Time trial weakness threatens GC positions, retained jersey by only 5 seconds (2 instances)
Can take jersey/results via positioning in attacking groups but lacks finishing speed
form_trajectory: negative: trend shows declining from GC contention to breakaway support role, losing ability to defend positions gained
